prompt: Generate a cozy poster promoting a book club using the café scene from the first image as the warm background, the stack of antique books from the second image placed on the table or to the side, and the text 'BOOK CLUB' from the third image as the title style. Use a white font and include the subtitle 'Saturdays at 5PM - Parnian Café' in smaller font below the title.
prompt_refined: Generate a cozy book club promotional poster. Utilize the warm, inviting café interior scene, including the window view and wooden table details from image 1, as the primary background. Place a prominent stack of ornate, antique, leather-bound books, styled after the books in image 2, on the wooden table in the mid-right portion of the foreground. At the top of the poster, centered, display "BOOK CLUB" as the main title, using the clean, elegant serif font style from image 3. Directly below the main title, centered and in a visibly smaller font, add the subtitle "Saturdays at 5PM - Parnian Café". All textual elements (title and subtitle) should be in white.
objects: cozy, warm, inviting café interior scene
prominent stack of ornate, antique, leather-bound books on the wooden table in the mid-right foreground
"BOOK CLUB" main title (white, centered at top, clean elegant serif font)
"Saturdays at 5PM - Parnian Café" subtitle (white, centered below main title, visibly smaller font)
